name: Gallery Chocolate Chip Walnut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs until foamy.
2. Gradually add the flour and sugars, mixing until well blended.
3. Stir in the butter until incorporated.
4. Fold in the chocolate pieces and chopped walnuts.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
6. Bake at 325°F for 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Serve warm with scoops of vanilla ice cream if desired.
